# Copilot Instructions for this project

## Description

A Day Skipper sailing certification training application                
# day-skipper-trainer

A Day Skipper sailing certification training application

## Overview

A web application for Day Skipper sailing certification training, built with Vite, TypeScript, React, shadcn-ui, and Tailwind CSS, using Supabase as the backend.
